name: RFISI: Phishing Email sent to Internal Mail Server
notes: This rule notifies when mail is received from a server associated with phishing campaigns. May indicate that insiders are being targeted for attack. See https://ibm.biz/rfisi_threat_intel
conditions_text: when the context is Remote to Local
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Mail Servers, BB:HostReference: Mail Servers
when any of Source IP are contained in any of Phishing Senders - IP
TD_list: APPLY RFISI: Phishing Email sent to Internal Mail Server on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Remote to Local
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Mail Servers, BB:HostReference: Mail Servers
AND when any of Source IP are contained in any of Phishing Senders - IP
RED_list: Event name: RFISI: Phishing Email sent to Internal Mail Server
Event description: Mail has been received from a server associated with phishing campaigns.
